entities.name: Careerspan
entities.context: V's company whose technical strategy should prioritize input mechanisms over output templates

entities.name: Input as Competitive Moat
entities.context: The belief that systematic listening and deep understanding becomes the true competitive advantage as generative AI commoditizes high-quality output

entities.name: Systematic Listening
entities.context: Deep, patient, structured ingestion and synthesis of complex context as the core value of AI systems

entities.name: LLM-based Systems
entities.context: AI systems whose value lies not in writing ability but in being highly patient, structured listeners that synthesize complex context

entities.name: Signal-to-Noise Ratio
entities.context: Information theory principle - the quality of input determines output value when generation cost approaches zero

entities.name: Transcription
entities.context: Input mechanism for capturing information, prioritized in Careerspan's technical strategy

entities.name: Multi-source Ingestion
entities.context: Input mechanism for gathering disparate signals into a unique knowledge base

entities.name: Deep Discovery
entities.context: Investigation-focused input mechanism analogous to a great investigator vs. a great writer

relationships.context: Technical strategy should prioritize input mechanisms to 'out-listen' competition
The moat is built through deep understanding and structured listening capabilities
The true value of LLM systems is their ability to be structured listeners, not their generation ability
Value is in input quality when generation cost drops to near zero
